body:
## الهدف / Goal

تحويل Dealix من «كود ناضج» إلى **شركة تشتغل اليوم**: أمر واحد يُنتج حزمة عمل يومية حقيقية (عملاء + مسودات + عرض)، وموقع واحد يعرض أقوى الخدمات — **بإعادة استخدام الموجود، بدون أي إعادة بناء، ومتوافق 100% مع دستور الشركة**.

Turn the mature codebase into a company that operates **today**: one offline command produces a real daily work pack (leads + drafts + proposal), and the canonical site presents the strongest services — reusing existing tooling, no rebuilds, fully doctrine-compliant.

---

## ما الذي أُضيف / What's in it

**1. `make activate` → `scripts/dealix_activate_day.py`** (glue only)
One offline command (no secrets/DB/network) that chains existing founder scripts into a single human index `data/founder_briefs/ACTIVATION_{date}.md` linking: founder brief · prioritized real leads · per‑lead call sheet · warm‑list drafts · war‑room drafts · scorecard · a rendered proposal. Every step degrades gracefully — one failure never crashes the run.

**2. `scripts/dealix_lead_graph_adapter.py`**
Bridges the curated **Saudi Lead Graph (158 public, company‑level prospects)** into the daily‑prep engine and builds a **call sheet** — for each lead: channel, first‑message angle (AR), recommended offer, likely objection — surfaced by the founder's `fit_score` (e.g. Foodics 78, Lucidya 70 first).

**3. Website — unified offer ladder** (`PricingPlans.tsx`, `ServicesPage.tsx`)
Lead with the **agentic‑AI operating company** positioning and name the strongest verticals (Maintenance Intelligence OS · Project Controls AI OS · Sovereign RAG · Executive Command Center), while keeping the **499 SAR entry Sprint** and all proof / no‑overclaim disclaimers. Canonical surface = `frontend/` (Railway, dealix.me).

**4. Tests** — `tests/unit/test_dealix_lead_graph_adapter.py`, `test_dealix_activate_day.py` (12 tests: doctrine invariants, no‑PII, fit‑ordering, graceful degradation).

---

## كيف تشغّلها / How to use

```bash
make activate     # → data/founder_briefs/ACTIVATION_{date}.md  (افتحه وابدأ يومك)
```

---

## القيد الصارم — «الاتصال بالجهات» / The hard rule — "contacting entities"

النظام **يُجهّز** كل تواصل (القناة + الزاوية + العرض + الرقم) **جاهزاً لموافقتك بضغطة** — لكنه **لا يرسل ولا يتصل تلقائياً أبداً**. هذا غير قابل للتفاوض (دستور Dealix + PDPL): لا scraping · لا واتساب بارد · لا أتمتة LinkedIn · لا إرسال خارجي بدون موافقة. كل مخرجات التفعيل محلية تحت مسارات **gitignored** — لا أسماء عملاء أو PII تُرفع للريبو.

The system **prepares** every outreach for one‑click founder approval but **never auto‑sends or auto‑contacts**. Non‑negotiable (Constitution + PDPL). All activation output stays under gitignored `data/` paths — no lead names / PII committed. `article_4_invariants` are reproduced in every artifact.

---

## التحقق / Verification

- ✅ `make activate` → exit 0, `DEALIX_ACTIVATION_VERDICT=READY` (15 of 158 leads surfaced, call sheet + proposal generated).
- ✅ `pytest tests/unit/test_dealix_*` → **12 passed**.
- ✅ `ruff` + `black --check` clean on all new/edited files.
- ✅ `frontend`: `npm run typecheck` + `npm run build` → exit 0 (pricing + services routes build).
- ✅ `git check-ignore` confirms activation outputs + `node_modules` are ignored; only 6 intended files changed.

---

## خارج النطاق (بصدق) / Out of scope (honest)

- No autonomous sending/calling (by Constitution + law).
- No live in‑browser dashboard of leads in this PR (needs API + DB + secrets — documented bring‑up commands are printed in the activation index).
- No merge of `frontend/` + `apps/web` (kept `apps/web` as the internal control plane).
- No scraping / purchased lists — the 158 leads are static, company‑level public info.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)

---
_Generated by [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code/session_01KfyyMQMtAuFGJ7ToZ72uTJ)_

commits.messageBody:
…ladder

Make Dealix operate day-one with a single offline command and a coherent
public site, reusing existing tooling — no rebuilds, doctrine-compliant.

- scripts/dealix_activate_day.py: `make activate` chains the existing founder
  scripts (brief, lead board, warm-list, war-room, scorecard, proposal) into a
  single human index data/founder_briefs/ACTIVATION_{date}.md. Glue only; every
  step degrades gracefully and runs offline (no secrets/DB/network).
- scripts/dealix_lead_graph_adapter.py: maps the curated Saudi Lead Graph
  (158 public, company-level prospects) into the daily-prep engine plus a
  per-lead call sheet (channel + first-message angle + offer + objection),
  surfaced by founder fit_score. Honest sources only (manual_linkedin_research /
  public_business_info_allowed — never fabricated warmth); HOLD/high-risk rows
  dropped; no contact PII.
- frontend: unify the offer ladder on the canonical site — lead with the
  agentic-AI positioning and name the strongest verticals (Maintenance
  Intelligence OS, Project Controls AI OS, Sovereign RAG, Executive Command
  Center) while keeping the 499 SAR entry Sprint and all proof/no-overclaim
  disclaimers.
- tests/unit: adapter + runner unit tests (doctrine invariants, no PII,
  fit-ordering, graceful degradation).

Doctrine: DRAFT-ONLY end to end — nothing sends, charges, scrapes, or
auto-contacts. All activation output lives under gitignored data/ paths, so no
lead names or PII are committed. Article 4 invariants are reproduced in every
artifact.
